######## Autogenerated Senate Mechanic ########
defined_text = {
	name = BRA_senator_name_dynamic
	text = { localization_key = BRA_senator_[?senator_id] }
}

defined_text = {
	name = BRA_senate_state_blurb_sl
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				NOT = { has_country_flag = BRA_military_coup_happened }
				has_country_flag = BRA_military_senado_elections
			}
		}
		localization_key = BRA_senate_state_blurb_loc
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = BRA_senate_state_blurb_coup
	}
}
defined_text = {
	name = BRA_senate_state_blurb_0
	text = {
		trigger = {
			set_temp_variable = { state_id = 0 }
			always = yes
		}
		localization_key = BRA_senate_state_blurb
	}
}

defined_text = {
	name = BRA_diagram_senator_s1
	text = {
		trigger = {
			set_temp_variable = { state_id = seat_idx }
			set_temp_variable = { cohort_id = 1 }
			always = yes
		}
		localization_key = "[BRA_sitting_senator_tooltip_dynamic]"
	}
}
defined_text = {
	name = BRA_diagram_senator_s2
	text = {

			set_temp_variable = { state_id = seat_idx }
			set_temp_variable = { cohort_id = 2 }
			always = yes
		}
		localization_key = "[BRA_sitting_senator_tooltip_dynamic]"
	}
}

defined_text = {
	name = BRA_map_change_graph_texticon
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 0 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_green_gdp_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 1 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_total_pop_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 2 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_green_inflation_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 3 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_industry_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 4 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_regional_pop_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 5 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_urban_pop_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 6 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_mech_rate_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 7 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_industry_rate_texticon
	}
}
defined_text = {
	name = BRA_map_change_graph_target_texticon
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 0 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_yellow_gdp_texticon
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			check_variable = { BRA_develop_graph_selected_stat = 2 }
		}
		localization_key = GFX_BRA_yellow_inflation_texticon
	}
}


defined_text = {
	name = BRA_diagram_senator
	text = {
		trigger = {
			set_temp_variable = { state_id = BRA_diagram_senator_state_id^seat_idx }
			set_temp_variable = { cohort_id = BRA_diagram_senator_cohort_id^seat_idx }
			always = yes
		}
		localization_key = "[BRA_sitting_senator_tooltip_dynamic]"
	}
}

defined_text = {
	name = BRA_Kairala
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_country_flag = BRA_Kairala
		}
		localization_key = BRA_Senator_Kairala
	}
	text = {
		localization_key = BRA_Senator_Guiomard
	}
}
